scripts.android:first: npm install && npx tsc -b && npx vite build && npx cap add android && npx cap sync android && npm run android:patch && npm run copy-kotlin
scripts.android:init: npm run build && npx cap init "Gluco Context" com.glucocontext.app --web-dir dist && npx cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor sync android
scripts.android:sync-patched: npm run build && node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor sync android && npm run android:patch
scripts.android:full: npm run build && npx cap add android && npm run copy-icons && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:setup: npm run build && npx cap add android && npx cap sync android && npm run android:patch && npm run copy-kotlin
scripts.android:rebuild: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npm run android:patch && npm run copy-kotlin
